comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit e167096 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan e1670968ed1ef22d7091c3316742a2ddf184ce60 -->
:hourglass: Testing commit e167096 with merge f449b28...

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/f449b28f618e06fe47a3afdf9cf78040e9a3befa.1528491784818040832/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing f449b28f618e06fe47a3afdf9cf78040e9a3befa to master...
Is there any context around why this was reverted? Did something break?

One of the new changes listed a lot of crufty warning messages.  I don't recall the exact wording but something like:

WARNING variable is an int and being cast to a double.

type of thing many times over in the output of a buildah command.
Yes we need to do a deeper dive to make sure we drop Warning messages down to Info, that are not that important.
FYI @pixdrift #766 was the PR that turned up the warning problem
